calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Distribution Of Assets, Status On Distribution Of Reserve And Filing Of Receipts
Off Calendar Nov-20-2024 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Rowena Navia, Esq., for Paula Bibbs, Executor.

At the outset, counsel advises of submitting for efiling a Supplemental Accounting. Counsel reports on the formally filed declaration regarding the mailing of a final distribution payment to Justin Hedemark, Esq., counsel for Jeffrey Tsuyumine. There is discussion regarding the bond ordered by the court on Oct-04-2023. The court rescinds the Oct-04-2023 order requiring bond. Counsel advises of the plan to submit an ex parte request to formally vacate the court's order regarding bond.

After additional discussion, the subject matter is taken off calendar.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Singh. Not Reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Distribution Of Assets, Status On Distribution Of Reserve And Filing Of Receipts
Off Calendar Sep-30-2024 Continued To Nov-20-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Distribution Of Assets, Status On Distribution Of Reserve And Filing Of Receipts
Off Calendar Jul-29-2024 Continued To Sep-30-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Rowena Navia appeared by zoom for Paula Bibbs (administrator).

Mrs. Navia stated that the $40,000.00 reserve has not been distributed yet, that she filed a declaration in 2023 regarding communication her client had with Jeffrey Tsuyumine, that Mrs. Bibbs is unable to be bonded due to her medical issues and that she was hoping to have Mr. Tsuyumine or Mr. Hedemark appear to confirm receipt of the assets. Mrs. Navia confirmed that Mr. Tsuyumine has not signed receipts for any of the assets that were turned over to him by Mrs. Bibbs. The court raised the issue of the administrator making distribution of the reserve and filing copies of the cancelled checks since Mr. Tsuyumine is not providing receipts. Status on distribution of the reserve is continued to September 30, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Proof of filing of bond is off calendar.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Jaime. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Proof Of The $40,000 Bond
Off Calendar Jul-29-2024 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Distribution Of Assets, Status On Distribution Of Reserve And Filing Of Receipts
Off Calendar Apr-29-2024 Continued To Jul-29-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Distribution Of Assets, Status On Distribution Of Reserve And Filing Of Receipts
Off Calendar Mar-11-2024 Continued To Apr-29-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Rowena Navia, Esq., for Paula Bibbs, Executor.

At the court's query, Ms. Navia reports on the status on Distribution of Assets, Distribution of the Reserve, and Filing of Receipts. The court reminds Ms. Navia of the delays with this matter. Ms. Navia reports of planning to ask residual Beneficiary Mr. Tsuyumine's attorney, Justin Hedemark, if he would consider waiving an accounting.

After additional discussion, the matter is continued to Apr-29-2024 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Not Reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Distribution Of Assets, Status On Distribution Of Reserve And Filing Of Receipts
Off Calendar Dec-18-2023 Continued To Mar-11-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Rowena Navia appeared via zoom for Paula Bibbs (executor).

Ms. Navia stated that there is not much in the account, that if the Court will allow her to finish the accounting, and that she will distribute the $40,000.00. The matter is continued to March 11, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross Moody. Clerk: Ateesh Datt. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Distribution Of Assets, Status On Distribution Of Reserve And Filing Of Receipts
Off Calendar Nov-13-2023 Continued To Dec-18-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Rowena Navia appeared via zoom for Paula Bibbs (executor).

Discussion was held regarding the suspension of Ms. Bibbs on another matter, that the bonding company didn't feel comfortable issuing a $40,000.00 bond, and that the accounting is 60% complete and should be complete by the end of the week. Status on distribution of $40,000.00 reserve is continued to December 18, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross Moody: Clerk: A. Datt: Deputy: Barrett: Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of Bond
Off Calendar Sep-11-2023 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Rowena Navia appeared via zoom for Paula Bibbs (executor).

Ms. Navia stated that the ex parte application and order for fixing the bond has been filed. New Status on filing ex parte petition to set $40,000.00 bond is ordered off calendar.

Judge: Ross Moody. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Bastain. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Distribution Of Assets, Status On Distribution Of Reserve And Filing Of Receipts
Off Calendar Aug-28-2023 Continued To Nov-13-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Rowena Navia appeared by zoom for and with Paula Bibbs by zoom.

Mrs. Navia stated that everything has been transferred to the beneficiary, and that she is waiting for the supplemental accounting in order to complete administration and to discharge the bond in the conservatorship matter. Mrs. Navia also stated that Mrs. Bibbs has been working on things, that Mrs. Bibbs has copies of the cashier's checks, but they don't have a receipt from the beneficiary, that the house was transferred and that everything was transferred. Mrs. Bibbs stated that they need to do a supplemental accounting before the beneficiary signs the receipt. The court expressed concern about the $40,000.00 reserve that is not bonded. The parties are to do a drop off ex parte petition for a $40,000.00 bond. Status on distribution of assets, etc. is continued to November 13, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Status on filing of bond is set for September 11, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.
Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Sae Phan. Not reported.

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Mar-09-2021 Granted Per Written Order

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Feb-09-2021 Continued To Mar-09-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Trisha Friedeberg appeared by zoom for and with Paula Bibbs by zoom.
Jeffrey Tsuyumine appeared by zoom in Propria Persona.

The Court expressed concern stating that this estate has been open for quite some time, that the Decedent died on January 3, 2019 and that it still doesn't have an inventory and appraisal. The Court noted that a partial number 1 inventory was filed, stated that they have to inventory the assets as of the date of death, not the assets on hand as of the date of the conservatorship and asked why the delay. Ms. Friedeberg that she is covering for Ms. Navia, that she does not know why the inventory and appraisal has not been filed, that the appraised assets which are real property and securities are with the Probate Referee, and that she does not know when it was sent to the Referee. Ms. Friedeberg also stated that she believes there was an investment that they realized needed to be inventoried and that the Referee is Karen Ann Simons. The Court informed Ms. Friedeberg that when she is covering for other Counsel, she needs to be prepared to address all of the Court's concerns, stated that it is concerned about the delay and why the inventory and appraisal is not from the date of death, that the petition is not very satisfactory and that the estate needs attention. The Petition for Approval of Report on Status of Administration is continued to March 9, 2021 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Status on filing of the inventory and appraisal is also set for that same date.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.
